sample_rows.cpSecondary_icd10_descriptions_en: Acute kidney failure, unspecified; Volume depletion; Essential (primary) hypertension
Need for assistance with personal care

sample_rows.coNursing_note_free_text: Spätdienst: Mobilized with assistance, Restful night sleep, Fluid intake adequate. Interventions: Pressure ulcer prevention implemented, Family discussion conducted. Evaluation: Condition stable.

Nachtdienst: Pain score 5/10 in surgical area, Wound without irritation, dry, No bowel movement for 2 days, Restful night sleep. Interventions: Blood glucose monitored, Family discussion conducted. Evaluation: Close monitoring still required.

Nachtdienst: Called staff multiple times during the night, Restful night sleep, No acute pain reported, Fluid intake below 1 liter. Interventions: Pressure ulcer prevention implemented, Fluid balance documented, Vital signs checked.
